channel.title: jasnxo_ TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from jasnxo_

item.title: got the bike and do the work on it myself..? and now the haters stop talking? 🤷‍♀️ #fyp #foryou #bikergirl #motorcyclesoftiktok

item.title: the Lord works in mysterious ways. had someone ask a year ago about us happening, i would’ve laughed. i never thought this would happen between us but the Lord is good and so is his timing. happy valentines to the man God sent me. to healing parts of me h
item.description: the Lord works in mysterious ways. had someone ask a year ago about us happening, i would’ve laughed. i never thought this would happen between us but the Lord is good and so is his timing. happy valentines to the man God sent me. to healing parts of me h
item.author: jasnxo_

item.title: it may be tempting at times to do what others do but our life isn’t about pleasing our fleshy desires, it’s about deepening our faith and relationship with Him 🤍 that alone is what will fulfill us, not the world. #fyp #foryou #jesuschrist #christian #chri
item.description: it may be tempting at times to do what others do but our life isn’t about pleasing our fleshy desires, it’s about deepening our faith and relationship with Him 🤍 that alone is what will fulfill us, not the world. #fyp #foryou #jesuschrist #christian #chri
item.author: jasnxo_

item.title: mind you, i rejected this man 3 times when i was single 😗 a man who yearns is a man who earns.. #fyp #foryou #relationship #relatable #yearning
